title: TRIUMPH-3: Retatrutide in participants with obesity or overweight and cardiovascular disease
study_design: phase 3 randomised clinical trial registry record
population: participants with obesity or overweight and established cardiovascular disease
key_results: Registry establishes the dedicated cardiovascular-risk population and planned outcome framework.
safety_findings: Registry evidence does not provide final safety conclusions.
limitations: Registry protocol record; final results must be sourced separately when available.
investigational_status_notice: Retatrutide remains investigational and is not approved for public use.
